title: Pokecade - Cobblemon
description: Cobblemon Modpack with client optimizations for use on servers.
body:
Pokecade

Pokecade is a curated Cobblemon modpack built specifically for stable and balanced server play. It combines Cobblemon with performance, quality-of-life, and multiplayer-friendly mods to create a smooth experience for communities.

This modpack does not add cheats or unfair gameplay advantages. It is designed for survival progression and multiplayer compatibility.

What This Modpack Includes

Cobblemon as the core gameplay experience

Performance optimization mods for smoother server play

Quality-of-life improvements that enhance usability without changing balance

Multiplayer-friendly utilities

Stability-focused mod selection

All included mods are selected to work together without conflicts and to maintain standard survival gameplay.

Why Download Pokecade?

Ready-to-use Cobblemon server pack

Balanced for multiplayer environments

Improved performance compared to standalone setups

Pre-tested mod compatibility

Simplifies setup for server owners and players

Instead of manually assembling mods, Pokecade provides a stable, preconfigured experience.

Intended Use

This modpack is designed for:

Multiplayer Cobblemon servers

Community SMP-style worlds

Long-term survival gameplay

It can also be used in singleplayer.

Requirements

Minecraft version: 1.21.1

Fabric or Forge: Fabric

Sufficient RAM allocation recommended for modded Minecraft


Important Information

This project is a modpack and requires installing all included dependencies.

It does not contain cheats, hacks, or unfair multiplayer modifications.

It does not bypass Mojang restrictions.

It does not upload data to external servers.

Pokecade is not affiliated with Mojang, Modrinth, or the Cobblemon development team.

All included mods remain the property of their respective authors and are used in accordance with their licenses.
